name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 30 Oct 2023
body: [{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Overview","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This release includes an important update for Catch integration."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Enhancements","bold":true}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Mapping Available for the New Fields in Catch","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Catch recently introduced two new fields – "},{"text":"Shipped-from Country","bold":true},{"text":" and"},{"text":" Shipped-from Postcode","bold":true},{"text":" – to help increase the accuracy of the estimated delivery date. In Neto, these two new fields are now available to be mapped in your Catch integration."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about Catch category and field mapping, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/set-up-catch-category-and-field-mapping","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Set up Catch Category and Field Mapping","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewFields.0685g00000HhzAqAAJ.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/NewFields.0685g00000HhzAqAAJ.png","name":"NewFields","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":822,"width":1600}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To map the fields, in Navigation, go to "},{"text":"Catch","bold":true},{"text":" >> "},{"text":"Product Field Mapping","bold":true},{"text":". Then, on the "},{"text":"Product Field Mapping","bold":true},{"text":" page, scroll down to the "},{"text":"Category specific product fields","bold":true},{"text":" section and find the new fields by clicking on the category that you wish to update."}]},{"type":"blockquote","children":[{"type":"blockquote-line","children":[{"text":"Tip","bold":true},{"text":": Click the information (i) icon to learn about the requirements and accepted values. For example, for the Shipped-from Country field, if all items within a category are shipped from the same country, select the \"type in a value\" option and enter a static value (say, AU) in the subsequent field. All acceptable static values are listed in the information tooltip."}]}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/newfields2.0685g00000HhyzAAAR.gif","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/newfields2.0685g00000HhyzAAAR.gif","name":"newfields2","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":361,"width":700}},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]}]
